text: NeRF (Mildenhall et al. 2020, Google/UC Berkeley) represents scenes as continuous volumetric radiance fields parameterized by MLPs, enabling photorealistic novel view synthesis from sparse 2D images.

3D Gaussian Splatting (Kerbl et al. 2023, Inria) achieved real-time radiance field rendering by representing scenes as 3D Gaussians with differentiable rasterization, winning SIGGRAPH 2023 Best Paper.
Instant NGP (Müller et al. 2022, NVIDIA) introduced multi-resolution hash encoding that accelerates NeRF training from hours to seconds, enabling real-time neural graphics applications.
